DSAHUD.Title: Draw Steel - Ability HUD
DSAHUD.Sections.Title: Title
DSAHUD.Settings.ShowFavoritesButton.Name: Show Favorites Button
DSAHUD.Settings.ShowFavoritesButton.Hint: Add a Favorites button (shown first) that lists all abilities, features, and items marked as favorites in Draw Steel Plus. Requires Draw Steel Plus to be active.
DSAHUD.Settings.BasicAbilities.Name: Basic Abilities Configuration
DSAHUD.Settings.BasicAbilities.Hint: Configure which basic abilities are shown for each player.
DSAHUD.Settings.BasicAbilities.Label: Configure
DSAHUD.Settings.HomebrewManeuvers.Name: Homebrew Maneuvers
DSAHUD.Settings.HomebrewManeuvers.Hint: Add homebrew maneuver UUIDs to show in the Maneuver menu.
DSAHUD.Settings.EnableTooltips.Name: Show Ability Tooltips
DSAHUD.Settings.EnableTooltips.Hint: Show a rich tooltip when hovering abilities and features in the HUD. If Draw Steel Plus is active it will render its own tooltip; otherwise a matching fallback tooltip is shown.
DSAHUD.Settings.ShowCharPanel.Name: Show Character Overview Panel
DSAHUD.Settings.ShowCharPanel.Hint: Show the character overview column (stamina bar, size, movement, skills) alongside the ability list. For heroes this appears in the Character popup; for monsters it appears in the Monster popup.
DSAHUD.Settings.ShowConditionsPanel.Name: Show Conditions Panel
DSAHUD.Settings.ShowConditionsPanel.Hint: Show a status conditions column in the Character popup for toggling conditions directly from the HUD.
